MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
David Briggs, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Freedom West Homes, Inc., represented by agent: Paula Butler.
Naoki Kaneko, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s): Leatrice Peed.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304-B, for settlement discussions.
Case settled.
Matter is taken off calendar, Trial date vacated.
